bug_report.summary: about:logins still uses Lockwise-specific favicon/icon in the browser tab
steps_to_reproduce: Observe the tab favicon/icon (and/or the page icon) used for about:logins.
expected_behaviors: about:logins should use standard Firefox branding assets for the favicon/icon (not a Lockwise-specific icon).
actual_behaviors: The about:logins tab still shows a Lockwise-style icon (orange lock/keyhole), indicating Lockwise-specific branding assets are still in use.

bug_report.summary: about:logins header no longer shows a page title after Lockwise branding removal (blank top-left header area)
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to about:logins and load the page.
expected_behaviors: Header should display a clear page title/branding (per intent, something like “Passwords”), so users can identify the surface.
actual_behaviors: Lockwise title/logo is removed, but no replacement title is shown; the top-left header area is blank while other header controls (search, sync prompt, menu) remain.

false_positive_reasons: Expected GUI difference due to intended code change

bug_report.summary: Support link label in empty-state help text is incorrectly lowercased (“passwords support”)
steps_to_reproduce: Open about:logins with no saved logins (empty state).
Look at the help bullets under the empty-state guidance text.
expected_behaviors: Support link text should be properly capitalized and consistent with other UI labels (e.g., “Passwords Support” or similar).
actual_behaviors: The link is shown as “passwords support” (lowercase), which looks like an unintended string/regionalization issue.

bug_report.summary: about:logins window/tab title still shows “Logins & Passwords — Firefox Nightly” instead of the new “Passwords” naming
expected_behaviors: The page/window/tab title should reflect the rebranded name (“Passwords”), per intent to retitle affected UI areas.
actual_behaviors: The title bar/tab continues to show “Logins & Passwords — Firefox Nightly”.

bug_report.summary: about:logins empty-state left-pane message container is broken (shows an empty bordered box)
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to about:logins with no saved logins (empty state).
Look under the “No logins found” message in the left pane.
expected_behaviors: The empty-state explanatory text should be displayed once, inside its intended container, with no blank/placeholder boxes.
actual_behaviors: An empty bordered rectangle appears where the explanatory message container is expected; the message text appears outside/above it, leaving a blank box in the UI.

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering

bug_report.summary: about:logins still contains user-facing “logins” strings (e.g., “Search Logins”, “Looking for your saved logins?”) after rebrand
steps_to_reproduce: Observe the search box placeholder and the large help/empty-state heading text in the main content area.
expected_behaviors: Branding/terminology should be updated to “Passwords” (and related strings updated) per change intent.
actual_behaviors: Search placeholder reads “Search Logins”, and the main empty-state copy includes “Looking for your saved logins? Turn on sync or import them.”

bug_report.summary: about:protections Passwords card icon/logo missing (blank placeholder) after removing Lockwise branding
steps_to_reproduce: Scroll down to the passwords section/card (previously the Lockwise card).
expected_behaviors: The password card shows a valid Firefox-branded icon (not Lockwise) with no broken/blank image area.
actual_behaviors: The left-side icon area of the password card is blank/empty (the prior Lockwise icon is removed but no replacement icon is displayed).
